poppk_ready_format.description: Formatted data ready for PopPK fitting with NONMEM-style structure

extraction_instructions.description: Instructions for extracting additional PK data from figures using WebPlotDigitizer
steps: 1. Open the paper PDF in WebPlotDigitizer (automeris.io/webplotdigitizer)
2. Select the figure with PK time-course data (usually Figures 2, 3, 4, or Extended Data)
4. Use automatic extraction or manually click data points along the curves
5. Calibrate axes by clicking known values on each axis
6. Export data as CSV or copy to clipboard
7. Convert to the format specified in 'poppk_ready_format' section
8. Add to the 'subjects' array in this JSON file

wesselhoeft_2018: Figure 2a: CircRNA vs linear mRNA protein expression over time
Extended Data Figure 2: Full time course data
liu_2023: Extended Data Figure 3: Individual animal data

quality_checklist: Verify axis labels and units match expected ranges
Check that data points follow expected PK curve shape
Compare extracted values with reported summary statistics
Note any transformations applied to the data (log scale, normalization)
Document any censored data points or below LLOQ values
